FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Uses a quick method to update timestamp strings in the game.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Improves the speed at which time-related information is displayed to players.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Dynamically updates timestamp strings based on game events.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Ensures players see real-time updates of time-related events in the game.

DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Fetches the latest version identifier from the code repository dynamically.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Allows players to benefit from the most recent updates and features in the game.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Quickly retrieves the version identifier from the code repository.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Ensures players have access to the latest game version information without delay.
